channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.description: Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs

item.description: Open Source Identity and Access Management For Modern Applications and Services

item.description: Spec-driven development (SDD) for AI coding assistants.

item.title: anomalyco /opencode | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The open source coding agent.

item.title: luongnv89 /claude-howto | Python | N/A
item.description: A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.

item.title: dbt-labs /dbt-core | Rust | N/A
item.description: dbt enables data analysts and engineers to transform their data using the same practices that software engineers use to build applications.

item.title: topoteretes /cognee | Python | N/A
item.description: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.

item.title: Anil-matcha /Open-Generative-AI | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Unrestricted Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

item.title: NanmiCoder /MediaCrawler | Python | N/A
item.description: 小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫 | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫

item.title: garrytan /gstack | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

item.title: JCodesMore /ai-website-cloner-template | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

item.title: hugohe3 /ppt-master | Python | N/A
item.description: AI generates a real, editable PowerPoint from any document — native shapes & animations, speaker notes voiced as audio narration, and the option to follow your own .pptx template, not slide images · by Hugo He

item.title: microsoft /PowerToys | C | N/A
item.description: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

item.title: google-labs-code /design.md | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

item.title: ripienaar /free-for-dev | HTML | N/A
item.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

item.title: IceWhaleTech /CasaOS | Go | N/A
item.description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

item.title: commaai /openpilot | Python | N/A
item.description: openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.

item.title: xbtlin /ai-berkshire | Python | N/A
item.description: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code / Codex 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built for Claude Code / Codex. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.

item.title: simplex-chat /simplex-chat | Haskell | N/A
item.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!
